title: Uruguayan Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy Uruguayan-inspired stir fry made with rich flavors of beef and a variety of vegetables.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside.
Add the onion, garlic, bell pepper, and carrots to the skillet. Cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the tomato to the skillet and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Return the beef to the skillet and stir in the stir fry seasoning.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the beef is coated in the seasoning.
